payload.label: pillow
payload.long_description: Rectangular beige, tan and cream horizontally striped fabric pillow cushion, horizontally oriented and partially cropped at the right edge; appears to be soft woven material with slight wear and low-contrast, mildly blurred surface texture, approximately 0.8 m from the camera.
